title: Christmas Music Discs
body:
Want to bring some holiday cheer to your Minecraft world? This mod adds a stack of new music discs, each one playing a classic Christmas tune. Imagine finding a mysterious disc in a snowy chest, popping it into a jukebox, and hearing the familiar melody of a holiday classic. It's the perfect way to add some festive fun to your Minecraft adventures!
